name: stacked-bar
description: Stacked bar chart showing cumulative values with multiple series and legend

xAxisData.name: xAxisData
xAxisData.description: X-axis labels. Can be a string array or object array with label and value. Example: ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar'] or [{label: 'Jan', value: 0}, {label: 'Feb', value: 1}]

data.name: data
data.description: Array of data series to stack. Each series can have custom border radius. Example: [{name: 'Series 1', data: [100, 200, 150]}]

stack.name: stack
stack.description: Stack group identifier. Series with the same stack value will be stacked together. Example: 'total'

barWidth.name: barWidth
barWidth.description: Width of the stacked bars as a percentage string. Example: '40%'

barGap.name: barGap
barGap.description: Gap between bar groups as a percentage string. Example: '10%'

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}
